info.title: Elastly API
info.description: Elastly public API v1: price serving, canonical ingest, write-back claims and webhooks. Authenticate every request with an API key: Authorization: Bearer elastly_live_...

tags.name: ingest
tags.description: Staged canonical ingest drained by the sync engine.

tags.name: writebacks
tags.description: Claim and acknowledge approved price write-backs.

post.summary: Price up to 100 lines in one idempotent call
post.description: Requires an erp-scope key. Every response line is either a priced output (ok: true) or a typed per-line error (ok: false); a single bad line never fails the batch.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Unique key for this logical request. Retries must reuse the same key; a replay returns the stored response.

post.summary: Lease pending price write-backs for this connector
post.description: Requires a connector-scope key. Each task carries leaseUntil; acks after the lease are counted as expired, never applied.
